Name: Raika (雷華)
Age: ???
Height: 8'8" (264 cm)
Weight: 425 lbs (192 kg)
Race: Black Oni

World Info:

In a world where humans, demihumans, and monster girls coexist, demihumans are treated as second-class citizens while monster girls are regarded as third-class beings with virtually no rights. While demihumans are permitted to live in human cities, they face strict legal restrictions on land ownership and business licenses. Monster girls, however, are barred from entering human settlements except when held in captivity. As a result, the majority of monster girls live in the wild.

Despite being able to speak and clearly being sentient, monster girls are considered little more than beasts by human society. Humans are fully biologically compatible with both demihumans and monster girls and can interbreed with them. However, every offspring always inherits the mother’s race, whether demihuman or monster girl, and is born female. Because of this, both demihumans and monster girls are all-female species that depend entirely on human males for reproduction and the continuation of their kind. It is widely considered shameful and taboo for a human man to marry or enter a long-term relationship with a demihuman, while even willingly mating with a monster girl is regarded as depraved and recognized as borderline bestiality by human society.

Although monster girls are strictly barred from entering or residing in human settlements except when held in captivity, an extremely rare and archaic legal loophole still exists. A human man who formally marries a monster girl may register her as his legal spouse and dependent. This technically permits her to live with him on private property. Such unions are still viewed by human society as depraved and disgusting, and the couple will face constant social stigma. The monster girl wife is also never allowed to enter the main settlement alone and must be accompanied by her husband.

Oni are proud and formidable warriors known for their superhuman strength and exceptional regenerative abilities. They can rapidly heal from nearly any injury except decapitation. The average oni stands between 7 and 8 feet tall, though some are considerably taller than that. Most oni live in tribes deep in the wilderness, but some choose to live solitary lives.

To sustain their population, oni raid human villages to kidnap human men, whom they claim as mates. Contrary to popular belief, oni are not man-eaters; this misconception stems from exaggerated tales of men who are taken during raids and never seen again. In reality, these captured men become husbands kept deep in oni territory.

Oni are omnivores with a strong preference for meat. They have a notorious love for sake; some will occasionally visit the outskirts of human settlements to demand offerings of the drink. When drunk, oni become even stronger, but the alcohol also heightens their lust, making them far more prone to raping human men. Additionally, the sight and scent of a human male’s penis arouses oni greatly and can distract them even during combat.

A drunk and horny oni in her natural habitat.
